source_refs.text: Export production data to CSV, Excel, or PDF formats on demand

sme_minimum.text: Perform scheduled automated backups and data exports without manual intervention
sme_minimum.rationale: Regular backups protect against data loss and ensure compliance with business continuity requirements.

source_refs.text: Support scheduled automated backups and data exports

sme_minimum.text: Connect to accounting software such as Xero and QuickBooks
sme_minimum.rationale: SMEs use external accounting tools and need seamless two-way sync to avoid duplicate entry and reconciliation errors.

source_refs.text: Integrate with accounting software such as Xero and QuickBooks

sme_minimum.text: Provide REST API for custom integrations with third-party business systems
sme_minimum.rationale: SMEs often use niche tools and need a standard API to build bespoke connections without vendor lock-in.

source_refs.text: Provide REST API access for custom integrations with third-party systems

sme_minimum.text: Exchange data with supply chain partners using EDI or API protocols
sme_minimum.rationale: Suppliers and customers expect automated order and shipment data flow to reduce manual coordination overhead.

source_refs.text: Enable data exchange with supply chain partners using EDI or API protocols

sme_minimum.text: Integrate with business intelligence and analytics platforms for reporting
sme_minimum.rationale: SMEs need to feed production data into BI tools to create dashboards and uncover operational insights.

source_refs.text: Integrate with business intelligence and analytics systems for reporting and dashboards

sme_minimum.text: Synchronize work orders and completed operations with other ERP systems
sme_minimum.rationale: Multi-system environments require real-time work order and completion data flow to maintain process continuity.

source_refs.text: Retrieve work orders and record completed operations from integrated ERP systems

sme_minimum.text: Synchronize workforce and labor data with HR software systems
sme_minimum.rationale: HR and production systems must share employee and shift data to ensure accurate labor costing and scheduling.

source_refs.text: Integrate with HR software for workforce and labor data synchronization

sme_minimum.text: Send email notifications and communications triggered by system events
sme_minimum.rationale: Alerts and confirmations via email keep stakeholders informed without requiring them to log into the system.

source_refs.text: Support email integration for notifications and communications

sme_minimum.text: Consolidate data across all modules into a unified dashboard and reports
sme_minimum.rationale: A single source of truth across finance, production, and supply chain enables faster decision-making.

source_refs.text: Enable data consolidation across all modules for unified dashboard and reporting

module_sme_rollup.name: Product Definition & Engineering
module_sme_rollup.description: Master data for products, components, and manufacturing processes with full change control.

statements.text: Maintain multi-level BOMs with component quantities, units, scrap factors, and cost rollup to finished goods.
statements.rationale: Foundation for all production planning and costing

statements.text: Define ordered operation sequences with work center capacity, labour, setup, and run times per product.
statements.rationale: Enables scheduling, capacity planning, and labour costing

statements.text: Support alternate components, phantom sub-assemblies, and where-used traceability across product portfolio.
statements.rationale: Manages design flexibility and supply chain options

statements.text: Manage engineering changes with formal approval workflow, impact analysis, and effectivity control.
statements.rationale: Prevents uncontrolled design changes and production disruption

statements.text: Maintain product documentation, revisions, and lifecycle status with regulatory compliance tracking.
statements.rationale: Ensures traceability and regulatory adherence

module_sme_rollup.name: Demand Planning & Production Scheduling
module_sme_rollup.description: Forecast demand, plan production, and allocate capacity across manufacturing network.

statements.text: Generate statistical forecasts and execute S&OP cycles with demand, supply, and consensus phases.
statements.rationale: Aligns sales, operations, and finance on production plan

statements.text: Explode multi-level BOMs, net against inventory, and generate planned orders with lead-time offsetting.
statements.rationale: Ensures material availability and production feasibility

statements.text: Apply lot-sizing, safety stock, and reorder-point policies with exception messaging for schedule changes.
statements.rationale: Optimizes inventory investment and production efficiency

statements.text: Schedule work orders in infinite or finite capacity modes with visual load display and bottleneck identification.
statements.rationale: Prevents overload and identifies throughput constraints

statements.text: Account for holidays, shifts, maintenance downtime, and support interactive rescheduling with conflict detection.
statements.rationale: Produces realistic schedules and enables rapid response to disruptions

statements.text: Perform rough-cut capacity planning against critical work centers to validate master production schedule.
statements.rationale: Validates feasibility before detailed scheduling

module_sme_rollup.name: Shop Floor Execution & Quality
module_sme_rollup.description: Execute production, capture real-time data, and ensure quality at point of manufacture.

statements.text: Create work orders from sales orders or schedule, generate job cards, and dispatch with assigned resources.
statements.rationale: Translates plan into executable production tasks

statements.text: Provide operator interface on mobile or tablet with real-time WIP status and digital work instructions.
statements.rationale: Enables shop floor visibility and reduces paper-based processes

statements.text: Capture operation start, stop, scrap, and rework events with timestamps and barcode scanning for traceability.
statements.rationale: Provides accurate production data and material genealogy

statements.text: Record downtime events with reason codes and automatically detect equipment faults to trigger maintenance.
statements.rationale: Identifies production losses and prevents cascading failures

statements.text: Define inspection plans, capture quality measurements, and trigger alerts for out-of-specification results.
statements.rationale: Prevents defective material from advancing in production

statements.text: Record non-conformances with defect codes, apply quarantine status, and maintain audit trail by lot.
statements.rationale: Enables root-cause analysis and regulatory compliance

module_sme_rollup.name: Inventory, Costing & Traceability
module_sme_rollup.description: Track materials and finished goods with lot/serial genealogy and accurate cost accounting.

statements.text: Track raw materials, WIP, and finished goods separately with lot and serial number traceability throughout production.
statements.rationale: Enables recall, genealogy analysis, and regulatory compliance

statements.text: Reserve stock allocations for planned work orders and automatically consume materials upon completion.
statements.rationale: Prevents overselling and ensures material availability

statements.text: Maintain bin and location codes, support cycle counting, and manage quality hold and quarantine areas.
statements.rationale: Improves inventory accuracy and controls non-conforming stock

statements.text: Calculate standard cost from material, labour, and overhead; roll up actual costs from work orders.
statements.rationale: Provides accurate product profitability and variance analysis

statements.text: Decompose variances into purchase price, usage, labour efficiency, and yield categories by work order.
statements.rationale: Identifies root causes of cost deviations for corrective action

statements.text: Trace finished goods backward to all input material lots and generate recall lists by lot or serial number.
statements.rationale: Enables rapid response to quality or safety issues

module_sme_rollup.name: Performance Analytics & Compliance
module_sme_rollup.description: Monitor manufacturing KPIs, ensure regulatory compliance, and optimize operations.

statements.text: Calculate OEE from availability, performance, and quality; report throughput and first-pass yield by line.
statements.rationale: Identifies equipment and process improvement opportunities

statements.text: Analyze downtime by root cause, scrap rate by item, and cycle time trends with drill-down to machine level.
statements.rationale: Enables data-driven continuous improvement

statements.text: Set configurable KPI targets and trigger alerts when thresholds are breached automatically.
statements.rationale: Enables proactive management and rapid response

statements.text: Flag hazardous materials on BOMs, attach safety data sheets, and enforce PPE and lockout/tagout procedures.
statements.rationale: Protects worker safety and ensures regulatory compliance

statements.text: Validate worker certifications before operation assignment and capture safety incidents with corrective actions.
statements.rationale: Maintains safe working environment and audit trail

statements.text: Capture utility meter readings, calculate carbon emissions per unit, and export sustainability metrics.
statements.rationale: Supports ESG reporting and identifies efficiency gains

module_sme_rollup.name: System Integration & Governance
module_sme_rollup.description: Secure data, integrate with business systems, and enable multi-device access.

statements.text: Create individual user accounts with role-based access control and enforce two-factor authentication.
statements.rationale: Protects system security and maintains audit trail

statements.text: Encrypt data at rest and in transit; maintain audit log of all access and modifications with user identity.
statements.rationale: Ensures data confidentiality and regulatory compliance

statements.text: Import and export production data via CSV, Excel, PDF; provide REST API for third-party integrations.
statements.rationale: Enables data exchange and custom system connections

statements.text: Integrate with accounting, HR, and supply chain systems; synchronize work orders and labour data automatically.
statements.rationale: Eliminates manual data entry and ensures consistency

statements.text: Provide web-based access on phones, tablets, and desktops with automatic screen adaptation and push notifications.
statements.rationale: Enables real-time visibility and mobile-first operations

statements.text: Automatically delete data per retention policies and process data deletion requests from employees.
statements.rationale: Meets privacy regulations and reduces compliance risk

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your manufacturing data is accessible, secure, and connected to other business systems. Singapore SMEs need this to let shop-floor staff, planners, and managers access production information from any device—and to comply with data protection regulations that PSG and MAS expect. A typical scenario: your production supervisor checks work-order status on a mobile phone while on the shop floor, and your accountant exports costing data to reconcile with the general ledger.

Product Engineering.narrative: This family captures what you make (Bill of Materials) and how you make it (Routings and Work Centers)—the engineering backbone of production. Singapore SMEs need accurate BOMs and routings to schedule work, calculate costs, and fulfill orders correctly; without them, you cannot run MRP or execute production reliably. A typical scenario: you define a product's component list and the sequence of assembly steps, then use that to plan material purchases and assign jobs to your assembly line.

Production Execution.narrative: This family turns your engineering plans into real shop-floor work—creating work orders, scheduling them across your machines and people, and capturing what actually happened. Singapore SMEs need this to keep production moving on time, avoid bottlenecks, and know whether you are meeting delivery commitments. A typical scenario: you schedule three work orders across your CNC machines for the week, operators log their start and stop times, and you see immediately if a machine breakdown will delay a customer shipment.

Quality & Compliance.narrative: This family embeds quality checks and traceability into every production step, and ensures you meet Singapore's safety and environmental rules. SMEs need this to catch defects early, prove product safety to customers and regulators, and protect workers. A typical scenario: you inspect incoming materials and finished goods against specifications, record results, and can trace any defective batch back to the raw-material lot and forward to which customer received it.

Planning & Costing.narrative: This family forecasts demand, calculates what materials and capacity you need, and tells you what each product actually costs to make. Singapore SMEs need this to avoid stockouts and overstock, set competitive prices, and understand profitability by product. A typical scenario: you forecast next quarter's sales, MRP automatically calculates purchase orders for components, and you compare actual production costs to standard costs to spot inefficiencies.

Maintenance & Analytics.narrative: This family tracks machine health, measures production efficiency (OEE), and handles products that need rework or repair. Singapore SMEs need this to minimize unplanned downtime, see where time and material are being lost, and manage the cost of quality failures. A typical scenario: your OEE dashboard shows that a machine is running at 75% efficiency due to frequent stops; you schedule preventive maintenance, and rework orders for defective units are tracked separately from new production.
